name: @gotong/example-butler-cross-hub
description: NET-M3 capstone — the resident butler asks a PEER HUB on the member's behalf (「问一下爸爸的 hub 今晚有没有空」). Two real hubs in one process over a real installPeerLink: the ask parks in the member's own /me first (nothing crosses before approval), then rides capability dispatch through the real wrapper (outbound allowlist + origin stamp), and the peer's answer returns in the same conversational turn. Deterministic, no API key.
